notes: Records approved canonical storage paths and deterministic storage contracts ONLY. Creates no data/market-intelligence/ record, no binding. Path approval does NOT authorize file creation.

properties: not consumed by runtime until a separately approved integration
canonicalRoot.authorities: CBW_EXCHANGE_MARKET_INTELLIGENCE_BRAIN_v1.md (data/market-intelligence/ tree) + CBW_MI_GEO_RECONCILIATION_STANDARD_v1.md (MI cell canonical; one binding per pair); mirrors approved KZ x Bybit P0-A canonical-paths decision

rules: single canonical cell path
no duplicate canonical copy under cells/by-exchange/**
any future by-exchange view is a generated index/lookup artifact, never competing truth
cell is the bare exchange-market-cell object with candidateMetadata removed
records contains the 16 normalized source records
every records[] item independently validates against market-source.schema.json
records sorted deterministically by sourceId
no duplicate sourceIds
envelope is a repository storage wrapper, NOT a replacement for market-source.schema.json
confidence/limitations must not be forced into source records when prohibited by the source schema (they live in provenance)
preserve all 55 claim-source links (41 SUPPORTS / 14 CONTRADICTS)
sort deterministically by linkId
every claimId and sourceId resolves
zero duplicate link triples
canonical relationship layer between claims and sources
does not influence production directly

mustPreserve: recovered source-truth review package hash (f7658b5f7bddc29d24fd09a2c06de09d2dcfe65e6de64cc40e91c0399a380c5f, 27833 bytes)
staging import PR #9 head 96d688d4e814f25f1be5f8ef542bfbe3f604c026 and merge commit 40b68632b9a41118035430cf0fd4e5569f1cd8e0; EOL prerequisite merge a88ed799fb5c12de1e7f0f2424b2b4df0ac1aba1
correctionRequired state and original/corrected claim text
provenance.rule: No provenance may be silently discarded.

rules: preserve exactly the 7 conflicts
all remain ownerReviewRequired=true
sort deterministically by conflictId
preserve reviewed sources, claims and unresolved evidence
do NOT auto-resolve conflicts during import
NOT a restriction-event file unless an individual record actually conforms to restriction-event.schema.json

binding.rule: Writing this non-active binding later does NOT authorize activation. Existing GEO passport remains production truth. Schema-unsupported fields (top-level active, promoSuppressed, existingGeoRemainsProductionTruth) must NOT be added.

prohibitions: no duplicate canonical record in another orientation
no version suffix in the canonical filename
history is preserved via Git + provenance, not mexc-v2.json

atomicCanonicalPackage.rule: The future execute task must create ALL six valid files or NONE. No partial canonical package. First write only; refuse overwrite.

rules: no automatic synchronization is permitted yet
no canonical value may silently overwrite legacy GEO
no production consumer reads data/market-intelligence/cells/** during build
discrepancies require explicit migration reports and owner decisions

canonicalVsProductionSeparation.note: The path decision does not authorize file creation.

recommendationScope: Canonical storage architecture approved (root + six by-country paths + envelopes + atomic-package + normalization + no-duplicate-truth) for KZ x MEXC. Records architecture ONLY; creates nothing under data/market-intelligence/. Canonical import execution, binding write/activation, production change, ranking/CTA/promo/affiliate, publication, MIGRATION_5 and deploy remain BLOCKED and owner-gated.
